title: Step 1
text: When the security operations room receives a report of a bomb threat, it must rapidly verify the source of the report and collect the initial available information related to the threat.

title: Step 2
text: Immediately notify the relevant specialized authorities through the approved emergency numbers and communicate with facility leadership to determine activation of Code Black through the internal overhead speaker system.

title: Step 3
text: Strictly follow all directions and technical guidance issued by specialists responsible for this type of incident in order to reduce potential risks.

title: Step 4
text: Monitor all possible locations related to the reported threat according to the initial information available, using the closed-circuit television monitoring system.

title: Step 5
text: Ensure that security personnel moving toward the suspected site do not use wired or wireless communication devices in order to avoid triggering potential risks.

title: Step 6
text: Warn all security personnel not to attempt moving, examining, opening, or approaching suspicious objects until specialists arrive and assess the scene.

title: Step 7
text: Establish a perimeter around the suspected area, prevent persons from entering it, and maintain site isolation until specialists begin their direct tasks.

title: Step 8
text: Execute evacuation of patients, staff, and others in the facility when directed by incident command and according to the severity and location of the threat.

title: Step 9
text: Coordinate and cooperate with specialized authorities to facilitate incident handling procedures in accordance with the approved protocol.

title: Step 10
text: Continue tracking security updates, operational information, and all incident developments and relay them to the relevant leadership and response authorities.

title: Step 11
text: Permit the resumption of activity in the incident area only after the event has ended and formal approval has been issued by the relevant specialists.

title: Step 12
text: Prepare and submit a joint incident report with the relevant specialists in the facility and the specialized security authorities to facility leadership.

title: Step 13
text: Provide the National Center for Emergency and Health Crisis Management with all required information related to the incident through the responsible authority in the facility.
